action.reasoning: Observation: rmse_z500 improved slightly to 454.20 (val 453.60) with h=256/b=12 (~15M params), lat-weighted loss, 20 epochs; loss drops to ~0.02 immediately then plateaus but val RMSE improves steadily. Analysis: moderate scaling helped but model still under-capacity for full 3-day dynamics (fast convergence, room to scale without OOM). Decision: incrementally scale to h=320/b=16 (~25M params), lr=1.2e-4, bs_train=24 (VRAM-safe), epochs=25, keep stride=2; update defaults/calls in model.py/train.py/predict.py; this balances compute (~1.6x prior iter time) within ~3h budget for further RMSE reduction; submit eval after.
